CustomField.description: If Billing Call or Webinar Status is Complete, shows the number of days from the Billing Call or Webinar Date to the One Bill Sent Threshold Met Stamp. (One_Bill_Sent_Threshold_Met_Stamp__c - Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If Billing Call or Webinar Status is Complete, shows the number of days from the Billing Call or Webinar Date to the One Bill Sent Threshold Met Stamp.
CustomField.label: Days Billing Call 1 to 1 Bill Sent Stamp
